content:
11. Expansion & Future-Proofing

This system can be extended by:
• Adding “AI” for AI-generated content: TXT-BOOK-AI-000123-01-AB12F3
• Including “HUMAN” for human-made content: MUS-SONG-HUMAN-045678-01-B89D32
• Using “COLLAB” for hybrid AI-human projects: IMG-ART-COLLAB-023456-02-F2E91D

Final Thoughts

The MORS system provides:
✔ A unified framework for categorizing any media type
✔ A structured yet flexible naming convention
✔ Searchability & integrity through metadata hashes
✔ Future-proofing for AI-generated & evolving media formats

Would you like me to generate an example database schema for storing these references in a system? 🚀’
